codes.name: Generic
codes.meaning: Unclassified error (rare — reserved for unexpected crashes).
codes.next: Rerun with --log-format json and inspect the stderr output.

codes.name: ConfigError
codes.meaning: Malformed weft.yaml or missing required environment variable.
codes.next: Check weft.yaml syntax; echo $WEFT_* to verify env vars.

codes.name: SourceLoadError
codes.meaning: Source .bim or TE folder could not be parsed.
codes.next: Run weft validate --source to isolate the load failure.

codes.name: TargetReadError
codes.meaning: XMLA read against the live workspace failed.
codes.next: Check the workspace URL and SP XMLA Admin rights.

codes.name: DiffValidationError
codes.meaning: Plan requires a drop (without --allow-drops) or a history-loss (without allowHistoryLoss).
codes.next: Read the error; opt in explicitly only if the change is intentional.

codes.name: TmslExecutionError
codes.meaning: The generated TMSL was rejected by the server.
codes.next: Inspect artifacts/*-plan.tmsl and the returned XMLA message.

codes.name: RefreshError
codes.meaning: Schema deployed successfully but the subsequent refresh failed.
codes.next: Model is deployed; re-run weft refresh for the stale tables.

codes.name: PartitionIntegrityError
codes.meaning: A partition that existed pre-deploy is missing post-deploy. Safety halt.
codes.next: STOP. Do not retry. Diff artifacts/*-pre-partitions.json vs *-post-partitions.json.

codes.name: ParameterError
codes.meaning: A required M parameter had no value from any source.
codes.next: See /docs/parameters.html — set the value via CLI, env var, or profile YAML.
